text: Stepping through the threshold into this vibrant, conceptual exhibit, I feel a tinge of anticipation. The text and screens invite contemplation about innovation and coexistence—familiar philosophical territory. Yet, surrounded by curated artifacts and glowing displays, I am struck by the juxtaposition of impersonal technology and personal reflection. I am both observer and participant in this staged inquiry. Here, I feel curious, slightly disoriented by the lighting and angles, but compelled to interrogate how environments—especially innovative ones—shape my sense of self and purpose.
